message:
refactor(config,cli): migrate load_config to StorageContext method, add quiet mode across commands, harden history path resolution and import validation

Config loading refactor:
- Move load_config() call into StorageContext::load_config() method across
  blocked, graph, list, and other commands that previously called the free
  function directly, reducing boilerplate and ensuring consistent config
  resolution

Quiet mode support:
- Add OutputMode::Quiet early-return guards to comments (add + list),
  count, graph (single + all), and list commands so --quiet suppresses
  all non-essential output while still performing the underlying operation
- Respect --quiet flag in list truncation warnings

History path normalization:
- Add normalize_jsonl_match_path() to resolve relative JSONL paths against
  CWD before canonicalization, fixing backup target matching when the active
  path is specified as a relative path
- Extract current_jsonl_path_for_backup_with_cwd() for testability with
  explicit CWD injection
- Add validate_history_dir_path() call on history command entry

Import validation hardening:
- Add is_marker_only_dependency() to skip placeholder dependency IDs
  ("-", "*", "+") during import instead of creating broken dependency edges
- Reject --parent flag when --file is used in create command
- Skip self-dependency with warning during import

Search, sync, update, and markdown_import improvements:
- Enhanced search output formatting and sorting
- Sync command improvements with better external project handling
- Update command enhancements
- Markdown import robustness improvements

New and expanded tests:
- e2e_errors.rs: new error handling coverage
- e2e_global_flags.rs: comprehensive global flag interaction tests (257 new lines)
- markdown_import.rs: expanded import edge case coverage (149 new lines)
- history.rs: test for relative external active path resolution

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
